description_long: This is a stylized child figure with a large, rounded hat or hood that covers most of the head and extends outward, giving a whimsical appearance. The child has short, spiky hair visible beneath the hat, and is dressed in a fitted, sleeveless top and pants with a belt or waistband detail. The arms are slender, with one hand holding a white, flat object, possibly a piece of paper or a tablet, while the other arm hangs by the side. The figure wears ankle-high shoes with thick soles, and the overall build is slim and youthful. The character's proportions and attire suggest a modern, urban setting, and the design is cartoon-like with exaggerated features.
description: A stylized child wearing a large hat, fitted sleeveless top, pants, and ankle-high shoes, holding a white object. The figure has spiky hair and a slim, youthful build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the child's face partially obscured by the large hat, spiky hair, and the white object held in front.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the hat's volume, the child's profile, and the arm holding the white object close to the chest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hat, the spiky hair, and the fitted clothing with visible waist and back contours.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side of the hat, the child's profile, and the arm position with the white object.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top and pants with a large rounded hat or hood
attribute_hairstyle: short spiky hair protruding from under the hat
attribute_posture: standing upright holding an object in front
